section_name: Alteration of convictions endorsed on licenses
text: No person shall wilfully erase or otherwise make illegible, the record of a conviction which has been endorsed on a license pursuant to the provisions of section five hundred fourteen.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 20. Suspension & Revocation
##### § 515 — Alteration of convictions endorsed on licenses

No person shall wilfully erase or otherwise make illegible, the record of a conviction which has been endorsed on a license pursuant to the provisions of section five hundred fourteen.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
